title: OEBF Profile
description: Cross-section profile for sweep geometry. SVG defines the shape in absolute metre coordinates; assembly defines layer composition and thicknesses in metres.

svg_file.description: Path to the SVG file for this profile, relative to the profiles/ directory. SVG path data uses absolute metre coordinates. The SVG viewBox corresponds directly to physical dimensions — a 250mm wall profile spans 0 0 0.250 H in X. No scaling transform is applied at load time. Tools display profile dimensions in millimetres and convert on write (e.g. 100mm → 0.100 in the SVG and JSON). Do not use normalised or pixel coordinates.

width.description: Total profile width in metres. Must equal the sum of all assembly layer thicknesses.

height.description: Profile height in metres. Null means height is taken from path geometry (for walls) or element height parameter (for columns, beams).

assembly.description: Ordered list of layers from face 0 outward. Layer boundaries are derived from cumulative thickness: layer 1 occupies X 0.0 to thickness[1], layer 2 occupies X thickness[1] to thickness[1]+thickness[2], and so on. No SVG parsing is required to determine layer boundaries.

thickness.description: Layer thickness in metres. Tools display this as millimetres (e.g. 0.100 → 100mm).
